title: 2026年03月19日 周四
summary: 伊朗战争外溢效应全面冲击全球能源与金融市场：油价冲上114美元、天然气价格单日飙升，欧洲与亚洲再度被“能源危机”阴影笼罩。与此同时，围绕霍尔木兹海峡护航与战争保险的新方案出炉，安全、贸易与成本三线同时拉紧。

sections.overview: 伊朗战争把能源与安全议题推到头条：油气价格跳涨、霍尔木兹护航与保险机制进入政策视野。国内外交人事与高层会见同步推进，为外部风险下的对外沟通定下基调。

items.title: Gas price surges 30% and oil hits $114 as strikes rattle markets
items.body: Donald Trump threatens massive attack on Iranian gasfield if Tehran continues to target Qatari facilities
items.insight: 油气同涨是战争风险最直观的“传导器”，30%气价与114美元油价将迅速抬升通胀与航运成本，政策反应会比市场更急。

items.title: How the Iran war has left Europe facing yet another energy crisis
items.body: It is not the first time that there has been deep energy-linked frustration in the heart of Europe.
items.insight: 欧洲再遇能源焦虑，说明即使有储备与替代来源，地缘冲突仍能通过预期与保险成本撬动价格，产业竞争力首当其冲。

items.title: US exploring tying naval escorts in Strait of Hormuz to government insurance
items.body: Vessels seeking protection may be required to take out cover from programme run by Development Finance Corporation
items.insight: 把护航与政府保险绑定，等于用制度化工具给风险定价并筛选受保护船只；一旦落地，可能重塑航运合规与保费结构。

items.title: US intelligence chief says Iran's regime 'intact' but 'degraded'
items.body: Lawmakers pressed intelligence officials about the Iran war, and if the Islamic Republic had posed an imminent threat.
items.insight: 情报口径称政权“仍完整但受损”，释放的是“冲突可持续”的信号：既为升级留余地，也为谈判留窗口，市场会据此押注久战。

items.title: Ukraine war undermining Russia’s Arctic plans, US intelligence says
items.body: Nonetheless, Russia still views the Arctic as vital to its security for a variety of political, economic and military reasons.
items.insight: 俄乌战事外溢到北极布局，提示战略竞争不只在前线消耗，而是牵动能源通道、资源开发与军事投送体系的长期规划。

items.title: Lockheed tests upgraded Precision Strike Missile designed to strike ships
items.body: The upgraded missile is backed by "significant investment" and is advancing rapidly through initial tests.

items.title: 重要新闻_中华人民共和国外交部
items.body: 2026年3月18日，中共中央政治局常委、国务院副总理丁薛祥在北京会见阿联酋总统中国事务特使哈勒敦。 · 丁薛祥表示，在习近平主席和穆罕默德总统战略引领下，中阿政治互信不断巩固，各领域务实合作成果丰硕。中方始...

items.title: 国家主席习近平任免驻外大使 --时政--人民网
items.body: 新华社北京3月17日电中华人民共和国主席习近平根据全国人民代表大会常务委员会的决定任免下列驻外大使： 一、免去肖建国的中华人民共和国驻文莱达鲁萨兰国特命全权大使职务； 任命陈少春为中华人民共和

sections.title: 今日看点

sections.overview: 国内聚焦外交与周边工作：驻外大使任免、中阿互动与中越机制会议传递稳合作信号。舆论场也被伊朗战事牵动，关于油价、供应缺口与日本抉择的讨论升温。

items.title: 重要新闻_中华人民共和国外交部
items.body: 2026年3月18日，中共中央政治局常委、国务院副总理丁薛祥在北京会见阿联酋总统中国事务特使哈勒敦。 · 丁薛祥表示，在习近平主席和穆罕默德总统战略引领下，中阿政治互信不断巩固，各领域务实合作成果丰硕。中方始...
items.insight: 中阿高层会见在能源动荡期更具含金量：既稳政治互信，也为经贸与能源合作提供“确定性锚”，对冲外部冲击预期。

items.title: 国家主席习近平任免驻外大使 --时政--人民网
items.body: 新华社北京3月17日电中华人民共和国主席习近平根据全国人民代表大会常务委员会的决定任免下列驻外大使： 一、免去肖建国的中华人民共和国驻文莱达鲁萨兰国特命全权大使职务； 任命陈少春为中华人民共和
items.insight: 驻外大使任免体现对外工作节奏与布局调整，重点国家岗位变动往往对应下一阶段双边沟通重点与经贸、人文议程推进。

items.title: 中越雙邊合作指導委員會舉行第十七次會議 --時政--人民網
items.body: 裴青山祝賀中國經濟社會發展取得巨大成就，表示在兩黨兩國最高領導人親自指導下，越中關系發展勢頭強勁，取得豐碩成果。雙方高層溝通頻繁，政治互信不斷鞏固，務實合作深入推進，民間地方交流日趨活躍，給兩國人民帶來實實在在的福祉。越南一貫視中國為對外政策的頭等優先和戰略選擇，堅定奉行一個中國政策，反對任何形式的“台獨”分裂活動。越方贊同中方提出的下步合作設想，願堅持越中全面戰略合作伙伴定位，進一步鞏固戰略互信，籌備好高層交往，加強黨際、議會交流，深化國防安全合作，推動經貿、農業、金融、綠色能源、人文教育等互利合作，密切多邊協調配合，妥善管控分歧，推動越中關系走深走實。
items.insight: 中越机制会议强调务实合作与民间交流，意味着在周边复杂背景下，双方更重视用制度化渠道管控分歧、扩大共同利益。

items.title: 伊朗战争要是打久了，那就远不只是油价暴涨的事了|美银|原油|沙特|全球能源价格|石油输出国组织_网易订阅
items.body: 它们把2026年的“新中位基准”定在$77.5/桶：1H26出现约110万桶/日的供需缺口，2H26供给恢复后转回盈余。关键前提有两条：一是能源资产没有“12个月以上”的永久性损毁；二是战争结束后霍尔木兹通行能在几天内快速恢复。研报也承认，这两条假设可能偏乐观——这正是其风险区间拉得很宽的原因。
items.insight: 研报把供需缺口与“12个月以上损毁”作为关键前提，提醒投资者别只盯油价点位，更要盯基础设施可恢复性与航道恢复速度。

items.title: 高市早苗摊上大事了，伊朗强烈警告：若日本助纣为虐，将对日本本土发动袭击！_搜狐网
items.body: 作为一个传统盟友的日本，目前正处于一个极其棘手的十字路口。伊朗革命卫队前指挥官穆加达姆少将的警告，使得日本政府在应对美伊冲突时感到巨大的压力。尽管伊朗声称不把日本视为敌人，但如果日本选择支持美国...
items.insight: 伊朗对日本发出本土袭击警告，体现冲突在“选边站”压力下向第三方扩散；对企业的风险管理与供应链决策是直接冲击。

items.title: 特朗普让日本开始行动，高市早苗沉默48小时，说了他最不想听的话_搜狐网
items.body: 这可不是闹着玩的，相当于日本自己动手掐断能源咽喉，到时候油价飞涨都是小事，工厂停工、民生瘫痪才是真要命。

items.title: 结盟敌人的叛徒？被伊朗队除名？阿兹蒙晒照惹风波
items.body: 2026-03-18 23:52:18 2026-03-19 00:52:49 · 体坛周报 · 《体坛周报》官方账号 · 43036文章数 93166关注度 · 往期回顾 全部 · \ 本地 · 房产 · 家居 · 时尚 · 公开课 · About NetEase | 公司简介 | 联系方法 | 招聘信息 | 客户服务 | 隐私政策 | 不良信息举报 Complaint Center | 廉正举报 | 侵权投诉 无障碍浏览 进入关怀版

sections.title: 国内

sections.overview: 中东打击升级引爆能源焦虑，欧洲再临价格与供应双重压力，亚洲通胀预期也被抬升。非洲大湖区出现缓和动向，但巴以冲突仍以平民伤亡提醒风险无处不在。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Qatar Reports More Attacks on Energy Infrastructure as Oi
items.body: Qatar blamed Tehran for strikes on its natural gas facilities, a day after Iran’s largest natural gas source was hit. The price of oil climbed to $114 a barrel as uncertainty over the war’s impacts on
items.insight: 卡塔尔能源设施再遭袭，把冲突从战争叙事推向“全球供给端事件”，任何进一步升级都将通过LNG与油轮航线放大到全球。

items.title: Gas price soars nearly 25% after strikes on Qatar hub
items.body: Energy costs jump after fresh strikes hit key infrastructure in the Middle East,
items.insight: 天然气近25%涨幅释放强烈信号：市场对供应中断的定价已从“概率”变成“趋势”，欧洲与亚洲的电力与化工成本将被重估。

items.title: How the Iran war has left Europe facing yet another energy crisis
items.body: It is not the first time that there has been deep energy-linked frustration in the heart of Europe.
items.insight: 欧洲能源危机的“既视感”回归，凸显结构性脆弱：替代能源与储气提高了韧性，但地缘冲突仍能令价格波动变成政治压力。

items.title: The Iran War’s Economic Threat to Europe and Asia
items.body: Inflation and its consequences for growth are a growing concern for countries where memories of the 2022 energy crisis are fresh.
items.insight: 把经济威胁点名欧洲与亚洲，实质是通胀与增长的再平衡难题：央行政策空间被压缩，财政补贴与产业扶持或再度加码。

items.title: US intelligence chief says Iran's regime 'intact' but 'degraded'
items.body: Lawmakers pressed intelligence officials about the Iran war, and if the Islamic Republic had posed an imminent threat.
items.insight: 美国情报系统在国会受压问“是否迫在眉睫”，背后是合法性与升级边界之争；该口径将影响盟友站队与市场风险偏好。

items.title: Three Palestinian women killed as missile debris hits West Bank beauty salon
items.body: Several other people were injured when shrapnel struck the beauty salon in Beit Awwa, in the southern West Bank.

items.title: DR Congo and Rwanda agree to ease tensions after talks in US
items.body: The conflict has persisted despite a peace deal signed by DR Congo and Rwanda in December.

items.title: Sony removes 135,000 'deepfakes' of its artists' music
items.body: The company says the proliferation of AI has enabled people to upload fake songs to streaming sites.

sections.title: 国际

sections.overview: 美方情报与军工动向并行：从“2027台海”评估到激光武器规模化、巡飞弹需求，反映战场技术迭代加速。俄乌战事持续牵制俄罗斯北极布局，战略竞争外溢到极地与太空链路。

items.title: US assesses China not planning to invade Taiwan in 2027
items.body: The assessment in the intelligence agencies’ annual report comes as Beijing has stepped up pressure on Taiwan with frequent military drills.
items.insight: “不计划2027攻台”的评估意在纠偏时间表叙事，但并不等于风险下降；更可能驱动各方转向长期消耗与灰色地带对抗准备。

items.title: The Pentagon wants to field laser weapons at scale within 3 years
items.body: Amid waves of Iranian drone attacks, the U.S. Defense Department is pushing to finally field high-energy laser weapons in the next 36 months.
items.insight: 三年内规模化部署激光武器，显示反无人机防空进入成本战：用更低边际成本对抗蜂群与廉价弹药，将改变战场防御经济学。

items.title: US Air Force special operations seeks kamikaze drones
items.body: The U.S. Air Force wants small one-way attack drones for its special operations forces, according to an Air Force Request for Information.
items.insight: 特种作战需求“自杀式无人机”，说明小型精准打击正在下沉到基层单位；未来采购重点会从平台数量转向弹药消耗与供应链。

items.title: In new timeline, Army set to take full control of THAAD missile program by 2027
items.insight: THAAD由陆军2027接管时间表，反映美军在导弹防御体系上强化军种整合与运维能力；也意味着相关升级与训练节奏将加快。

items.title: Lockheed tests upgraded Precision Strike Missile designed to strike ships
items.body: The upgraded missile is backed by "significant investment" and is advancing rapidly through initial tests.
items.insight: 精确打击导弹升级为反舰能力，是对海上拒止场景的回应；一旦量产部署，将对近海作战与岛链海域的威慑结构产生影响。

items.title: Ukraine war undermining Russia’s Arctic plans, US intelligence says
items.body: Nonetheless, Russia still views the Arctic as vital to its security for a variety of political, economic and military reasons.

items.title: UK, Netherlands, Finland in talks to set up defense investment bank
items.body: The multilateral mechanism can include non-EU partners such as the U.K., according to Dutch officials.

items.title: Pentagon CTO ‘pretty confident’ about life after Anthropic

sections.title: 军事与安全

sections.overview: 能源资产遭袭带动油气暴涨，价格、保险与护航成为同一条成本链条上的关键变量。市场也在重新给战争风险定价：从航运保险到企业业绩指引，冲击正向实体传导。

items.title: Gas price surges 30% and oil hits $114 as strikes rattle markets
items.body: Donald Trump threatens massive attack on Iranian gasfield if Tehran continues to target Qatari facilities
items.insight: 油到114美元、气价暴涨把“战争溢价”拉满，短期看是交易机会，长期看会挤压制造业利润并推高全球运输与化肥成本。

items.title: Brent Oil Jumps as Major Energy Assets Are Targeted in Mideast
items.body: Oil extended gains to more that 10% following attacks on some of the Middle East’s most important energy facilities, raising concerns of an escalating impact from the almost three-week-old conflict th
items.insight: 布伦特涨超10%源于能源资产被直接攻击，这比一般制裁更具破坏性；市场关注点会从产量数据转向设施修复与防护能力。

items.title: US exploring tying naval escorts in Strait of Hormuz to government insurance
items.body: Vessels seeking protection may be required to take out cover from programme run by Development Finance Corporation
items.insight: 政府保险绑定护航，相当于把军事保护货币化、制度化；若推广，可能形成新的全球航运“准入门槛”和价格歧视机制。

items.title: Trump sails into battle with Lloyd’s of London
items.body: The market’s historic strength in marine war insurance is being challenged by the US
items.insight: 特朗普与劳合社的保险之争，折射美国试图把风险定价权从伦敦转移；海运战争险若分裂，全球贸易成本将出现结构性上移。

items.title: Iran sets its price to end the war
items.body: Islamic regime is digging in for a protracted conflict as it seeks to ensure the US and Israel will not attack again
items.insight: “伊朗设定结束战争的价格”强调以安全承诺换取停火收益；这类谈判若久拖不决，市场会把高油价视为新常态而非短波动。

items.title: CK Hutchison Profit Misses, With Outlook Dented By Iran War
items.body: CK Hutchison Holdings Ltd. signaled it will aggressively pursue new deals to bolster shareholder value, after the conglomerate’s 2025 profit missed expectations and as it navigates a volatile geopolit

items.title: How the White House tries to sell war and death as a game
items.body: Declassified footage spliced with cartoon and action movie clips seeks to glorify US military prowess

items.title: Battersea Power Station in dispute with fired CEO over accounts
items.body: Company denies any accounting irregularity or retaliation

sections.title: 财经与市场

sections.overview: AI产业进入“压缩与代理”竞赛：模型压缩走向主流，智能体替代App的叙事加速。与此同时，数据边界与内容治理拉响警报：Meta权限泄露、FBI购买位置数据、深度伪造泛滥同台出现。

items.title: Nvidia is quietly building a multibillion-dollar behemoth to rival its chips bus
items.body: Nvidia's networking business raked in $11 billion last quarter despite getting significantly less fanfare than chips and gaming.
items.insight: 英伟达网络业务11亿美元级别增长，说明AI基础设施不只拼算力芯片，更拼互联与数据中心架构，产业链利润分配将被改写。

items.title: Meta is having trouble with rogue AI agents
items.body: A rogue AI agent inadvertently exposed Meta company and user data to engineers who didn't have permission to see it.
items.insight: Meta“失控智能体”暴露权限管理短板：当代理能自动行动时，传统的访问控制更易被绕过，企业需用审计与隔离重建安全边界。

items.title: The FBI is buying Americans’ location data
items.body: FBI director Kash Patel admitted that the agency is buying location data that can be used to track people's movements. Unlike information obtained from cellphone providers, this data can be accessed w
items.insight: FBI购买位置数据把“商业数据=执法能力”问题摆上台面，隐私与合规争议会倒逼数据经纪行业收缩，也影响广告与风控生态。

items.title: Multiverse Computing pushes its compressed AI models into the mainstream
items.body: After compressing models from major AI labs including OpenAI, Meta, DeepSeek and Mistral AI, Multiverse Computing has launched both an app that showcases the capabilities of its compressed models and
items.insight: 模型压缩走向主流意味着AI将更快落地到端侧与企业内网；成本下降会扩大使用面，但也可能让管控更难、滥用门槛更低。

items.title: Nothing CEO Carl Pei says smartphone apps will disappear as AI agents take their
items.body: Nothing CEO Carl Pei says AI agents will eventually replace apps, shifting smartphones toward systems that understand intent and act on a user's behalf.
items.insight: “应用消失、智能体上位”是交互范式之争：赢家可能是掌握系统入口与个人数据的厂商，开发者生态将从做App转向做能力模块。

items.title: Two Palantir veterans just came out of stealth with $30 million and a Sequoia st
items.body: The founders are worth paying attention to.

items.title: Trump is threatening international students, and a new bill could help stop him
items.body: A bipartisan duo is pushing back on President Donald Trump's attempts to end a program that lets hundreds of thousands of foreign students work in the US for a year after graduation. Reps. Sam Liccard

items.title: Sam Altman’s thank-you to coders draws the memes
items.body: Altman expresses gratitude for people who knew how to write their code from scratch. The internet replies with salty jokes.

sections.title: 科技前沿

sections.overview: 电动车政策与技术两条线同时加速：联邦EV费用提案引发公平性争论，固态电池续航目标再刷新想象空间。车企的能源布局与产线调整也在重塑供应链，太阳能与储能成为新关键词。

items.title: A solid-state EV battery that can achieve 800 miles of driving range — It’s beco
items.insight: 固态电池向800英里续航逼近，将把竞争从“续航焦虑”转向“成本与量产可靠性”；一旦规模化，充电网络压力也会被重新定义。

items.title: New EV fee proposals charge owners 2-3x what gas drivers pay in federal tax
items.body: A growing number of states and federal lawmakers are pushing flat annual
items.insight: EV年费拟按汽油车税负的2-3倍征收，争议点在“补路费”还是“惩罚转型”；政策走向将直接影响电动车渗透率与二手残值。

items.title: GM–LG shifts a US plant from EV batteries to LFP energy storage
items.insight: GM-LG把电池产线转向LFP储能，说明盈利确定性正从车端转向电网侧；这也可能缓解动力电池过剩与价格战压力。

items.title: Toyota locks in power from a massive new Texas solar farm
items.body: Avantus and Toyota Tsusho Amer
items.insight: 丰田锁定德州大型太阳能电力，体现车企把能源成本当成核心竞争力；未来“制造+电力采购”将同步纳入ESG与成本核算。

items.title: Range Rover’s next electric SUV is bringing an entirely new look inside and out
items.body: The electric
items.insight: 路虎电动SUV重塑内外设计，意味着豪华品牌要用体验与差异化对抗同质化电动化；软件与座舱将成为溢价主战场。

items.title: Hyundai’s most affordable EV gets a ‘luxury’ upgrade — Here’s our first look at
items.body: Hyundai launched the Casp

items.title: 新造车9月销量：卷低价奏效，“理小零”创新高-36氪
items.body: 可以预见，随着新车的上市，岚图、智己在10月的交付量应该会更上一层楼。 · 最后还有一个亮点是极越。极越的月交付量已从6月的444辆增长至9月的2605辆，增速迅猛。 · 销量的增长或许与极越近期在营销上的发力有关。除了在极越07发布会上邀请了李彦宏、曾毓群、李斌等大佬造势外，极越CEO夏一平还在持续做直播、拍视频，甚至连续直播18小时测试极越07续航。

items.title: 2024，汽车业22大预言-36氪
items.body: 从“蔚小理”到华为、比...们扎堆发布售价50万甚至更高价格的新车型。“再不努力工作，就只能开BBA了”，一度成为社交网络上的热门话题。 · 2024年，它们还想走得更远。蔚来ET9的野心是“去抢BBA最核心的根据地”，理想则要“挑战BBA在中国区的销量”...

sections.title: 汽车

sections.overview: 本日数据未提供旅游板块原始新闻，暂无可据以编辑导读与排序的条目。建议关注中东局势对航线、保险与出行成本的外溢影响。
sections.title: 旅游

sections.overview: 国际娱乐以内容交易与IP资产运作为主线：音乐目录收购、国际销售与厂牌新设密集。纪录片与舞台评论类报道也在强化“现实题材”的回潮。

items.title: Majority Stake in Tina Turner Catalog Acquired by Pophouse
items.body: Pophouse Entertainment, the Sweden-based company co-founded by ABBA’s Björn Ulvaeus, has completed a transaction that sees Pophouse becoming an owner alongside BMG in “the music interests of the music
items.insight: 音乐目录股权交易继续升温，说明“现金流型内容资产”仍受追捧；在流媒体增速放缓背景下，版权成为更确定的金融化标的。

items.title: Louis Theroux on Capturing Reality of Israeli Settlements in ‘The Settlers’: ‘I’
items.body: In 2010, British journalist Louis Theroux went to Israel to interview ultra-nationalist Jewish settlers who believed it was their religious and political obligation to populate the West Bank for the B
items.insight: 以定居点为主题的纪录片引发关注，显示现实政治议题正回到主流叙事中心；内容产业在分裂舆论中更依赖真实性与立场透明。

items.title: The Open Reel Swoops on Málaga WIP Winner ‘Little Tragedies’ (EXCLUSIVE)
items.body: Italy’s The Open Reel has picked up international sales rights to Daniel Nolasco’s Brazilian hybrid feature “Little Tragedies” (“Pequenas tragédias”), winner last week of the Malaga Festival’s W
items.insight: WIP获奖片迅速被国际销售公司拿下，反映影展市场对“制作中项目”的提前锁定；融资压力下，提前交易能显著提高项目确定性。

items.title: Red Empire, Organic Bow Hybrid AI Animated ‘Home Away AI.i.Ce‘ (EXCLUSIVE)
items.body: Brisbane’s Red Empire Prods. and Taipei- and Los Angeles-based Organic Media Group have unveiled their first animated vertical series, “Home Away AI.i.Ce,” at Hong Kong FilMart. Created and written by
items.insight: “混合AI动画”合作上新，标志制作流程向AI渗透更深；关键不在噱头，而在能否稳定降低工期并通过版权与署名的合规考验。

items.title: Former Buccaneer & Cineflix Execs Launch Drama Outfit High Road Entertainment
items.body: EXCLUSIVE: Former Buccaneer co-CEO Richard Tulk-Hart and former Cineflix Head of Scripted TV James Durie are taking the High Road. The pair have joined forces to launch High Road Entertainment, a new
items.insight: 前高管组建新剧集公司，显示流媒体时代制作端仍在重组：更轻资产、更国际化、以项目制吸引人才与融资将成为常态。

items.title: Russell T. Davies & Pet Shop Boys Reviving ‘It’s A Sin’ For Contemporary Dance S
items.body: It’s a Sin creator Russell T. Davies is reviving his hit Channel 4 and HBO drama with British synth pop duo Pet Shop Boys. The group have teamed with dance studio Rambert and festival producer G

items.title: Lola Young Proves She’s a Bona Fide Rock Star in a Bravura Return to the Stage i
items.body: How many phenomenal young British female singers can one world withstand? It’s hard to imagine a more enjoyable onslaught than the wave that has brought us Olivia Dean, Raye and Sienna Spiro, am

items.title: LIV Golf South Africa 2026: Where to Watch the Golf Tournament Live Online
items.body: With the first tournament in Africa of the season, the 2026 LIV Golf South Africa tees off starting on Thursday, Mar. 19 and goes until Sunday, Mar. 22 at Club at Steyn City in Midrand, South Africa.

sections.title: 娱乐

sections.overview: NCAA“附加赛”爆冷与晋级故事持续发酵，篮球与橄榄球规则讨论并行。NBA方面湖人连胜、勇士直言附加赛，季后赛格局正在快速定型。

items.title: LeBron's 6 dunks key Lakers' 7th straight win
items.body: LeBron James put on a show Wednesday night in Houston as the Lakers matched their winning streak to a season-best seven games.
items.insight: 詹姆斯6次扣篮带队七连胜，既是个人状态信号，也是湖人冲刺季后赛的“化学反应”注脚；西部卡位或因此重新洗牌。

items.title: Four English teams out in 24 hours - what happened and why?
items.body: With just two out of six Premier League teams progressing to the Champions League quarter-finals, what went wrong for the English sides?
items.insight: 24小时四支英格兰球队出局揭示联赛强不等于欧战稳：赛程、伤病与战术适配才是淘汰赛关键，球队建队策略或将调整。

items.title: NFL to consider 5-year window for pick trades
items.body: The Browns are proposing a rule change that would allow NFL teams to trade draft picks five years into the future instead of three.
items.insight: 允许交易未来5年选秀权将显著提高豪赌空间，也放大“透支未来”的系统性风险；联盟需要平衡竞争与财务/战绩崩盘的外部性。

items.title: Miami (Ohio): SMU win 'proved doubters wrong'
items.body: After much debate in the lead-up to NCAA tournament selections, Miami (Ohio) beat SMU in the First Four on Wednesday night.
items.insight: 迈阿密(俄亥俄)“证明质疑者错了”是附加赛叙事核心：单场淘汰让球队心态与临场执行凌驾纸面实力，黑马概率天然更高。

items.title: Prairie View A&M's run continues in First Four win
items.body: One year after winning only five games, Prairie View A&M continued its dramatic turnaround by earning its first NCAA tournament victory, a 67-55 triumph over Lehigh on Wednesday night in the First Fou
items.insight: 草原景观农工大学的逆袭延续，体现NCAA体系下培养与策略的回报周期；对中小项目而言，稳定防守与节奏控制更易创造奇迹。

items.title: Kerr to the point: Dubs 'going to be in the play-in'
items.body: After a sixth loss in seven games, Warriors coach Steve Kerr laid bare the cold reality his team has been facing as it hobbles toward the regular season's conclusion: "We're going to be in the play-in

items.title: 'I thought I'd be bleeped by BBC' - but Hunt's words resonate
items.body: British sprinter Amy Hunt on inspiring female athletes to get university degrees as she prepares to compete at the World Athletics Indoor Championships.

items.title: Make your picks now
items.body: Like favorites? Pick one as your champ

sections.title: 体育

sections.overview: AI创业与大厂并购持续改写职业版图：从“提示词化软件”到团队整体并入微软，机会与淘汰同频发生。更值得关注的是新岗位走俏——懂技术又懂业务的“翻译型人才”正在成为组织刚需。

items.title: Microsoft hires the team of Sequoia-backed AI collaboration platform, Cove
items.body: AI collaboration startup Cove is shutting down after its team joined Microsoft, with service ending April 1 and customer data set for deletion.
items.insight: Cove团队并入微软是典型“人才并购”：产品停服但能力被吸收，创业者与求职者都要适应“被收编”成为退出方式之一。

items.title: This startup wants to make enterprise software look more like a prompt
items.body: The company has raised $12 million in seed funding to build an AI operating system for enterprise.
items.insight: 让企业软件像提示词一样使用，是把复杂系统的门槛压到业务端；若成功，将重塑B端岗位分工，让“会提需求”成为硬技能。

items.title: AI时代催生新职业需求：懂技术的业务翻译人才走俏
items.body: 这位朋友的儿子，学过编程、懂技术逻辑，恰恰是传统行业最需要的那种“翻译人才”。虽然在企业中从事与IT无关的岗位，却可以在第一时间将本岗位那些因技术成本太高而被忽视的细碎需求落地。这不是AI对程序员的替代，而是对程序员职业领域的扩容。
items.insight: “懂技术的业务翻译”走俏，说明AI并非只替代，而是在组织中制造新接口岗位；能把碎片需求产品化的人会更值钱。

items.title: The leaderboard “you can’t game,” funded by the companies it ranks
items.body: Artificial intelligence models are multiplying fast, and competition is stiff. With so many players crowding the space, which one will be the best — and who decides that? Arena, formerl
items.insight: 不可被刷榜的评测榜单若由被评公司资助，核心在治理与透明度；它既可能提升行业标准，也可能引发新的利益冲突争议。

items.title: Rebel Audio is a new AI podcasting tool aimed at first-time creators
items.body: Rebel Audio is a new all-in-one podcasting tool that allows creators to record podcasts, edit, clip content for social, and publish episodes, all without ever leaving the platform.
items.insight: 面向新手的一体化AI播客工具降低创作门槛，但也会扩大内容同质化；真正的差异化将回到选题、观点与分发能力。

items.title: The PhD students who became the judges of the AI industry
items.body: Artificial intelligence models are multiplying fast, and competition is stiff. With so many players crowding the space, which one will be the best — and who decides that? Arena, formerl

items.title: 2023年的科技行业，这些技能不可或缺-36氪
items.body: “回顾过去 24 个月的招聘和解雇人数相关数据，我们会发现，Meta、Salesforce、微软（Microsoft）等公司招聘的员工数远远超过其解雇的员工数，甚至可达解雇员工人数的 10 倍。” 但根据 LinkedIn 今年 2 月的劳动力雇佣报告显示，技术、信息和媒体行业自去年春季以来呈现出最大用工跌幅（招聘人数下滑 41%）。为了在这些领域继续保持竞争力，求职者必须得掌握强大的技术性技能。

items.title: 2023年，蓄势待发的5大科技赛道-36氪
items.body: 首超30万亿元，今年国家钱往哪花：民生占比超四成，社保和就业增加近3000亿元 · 乱世买黄金？真有事仍是“现金为王” ... 按火必全球顾问孙宇晨的说法，火必最近的业务做的很好，正是发展的关键时期。 ... 本站由 阿里云 提供计算与安全服务 违法和不良信息、未成年人保护举报电话：010-89650707 举报邮箱：jubao@36kr.com 网上有害信息举报 · © 2011~2026 北京多氪信息科技有限公司 | 京ICP备12031756号-6 | 京ICP证150143号 | 京公网安备11010502057322号

sections.title: 热门方向

sections.overview: 全球公共卫生出现两种对照：一边是五岁以下儿童死亡下降放缓、中东冲突加剧医疗崩溃；另一边是多国被WHO认证消除重大传染病传播。流感疫苗成分建议出炉与咖啡长期研究，也为个体健康提供可执行线索。

items.title: Conflict deepens health crisis across Middle East, WHO says
items.body: More than ten days into the latest escalation of conflict in the Middle East, health systems across the Region are coming under strain as injuries and displacement rise, attacks on health care cont
items.insight: WHO提示中东冲突加深卫生危机，重点不只在伤员救治，更在基础公共卫生与慢病管理被打断；次生死亡常在战后集中爆发。

items.title: Progress in reducing child deaths slows as 4.9 million children die before age f
items.body: An estimated 4.9 million children died before their fifth birthday in 2024, including 2.3 million newborns, according to new estimates released today. Most of these deaths are preventable
items.insight: 2024年仍有490万儿童未满五岁死亡，且下降放缓，意味着疫苗、营养与基础医疗投入出现瓶颈；政策需回到可达性与资金稳定。

items.title: Recommendations for influenza vaccine composition for the 2026-2027 northern hem
items.body: The World Health Organization (WHO) today announced recommendations for the viral composition of influenza (or “flu”) vaccines for the 2026-2027 northern hemisphere influenza season. The announcement
items.insight: 流感疫苗成分建议提前公布，为各国秋冬免疫准备争取时间；对企业与学校而言，及早规划接种与防控能显著降低缺勤与医疗挤兑。

items.title: Denmark becomes first country in the European Union to eliminate mother-to-child
items.body: The World Health Organization (WHO) has certified Denmark for the elimination of mother-to-child transmission (EMTCT) of HIV and syphilis, recognizing the country's sustained commitment to ensuring ev
items.insight: 丹麦消除母婴传播的认证说明“系统能力”可复制：产检覆盖、检测随访与抗病毒治疗缺一不可，为其他国家提供可操作模板。

items.title: Chile becomes the first country in the Americas to be verified by WHO for the el
items.body: The World Health Organization (WHO), together with the Pan American Health Organization (PAHO), congratulates Chile for becoming the first country in the Americas – and the second globally – to be off
items.insight: 智利在美洲率先消除麻风病，体现持续监测与去污名化的重要性；当病例稀少时，公共卫生更容易因忽视而反弹。

items.title: Your daily coffee may be protecting your brain, 43-year study finds
items.body: Your morning coffee or tea could be quietly supporting your brain health. A long-term study found that moderate consumption of caffeinated coffee or tea was linked to an 18% lower risk of dementia and

items.title: The surprising cancer link between cats and humans
items.body: Scientists have mapped the genetics of cancer in cats for the first time at scale, uncovering major overlaps with human cancers. Key mutations—like those linked to breast cancer—appear in both species

items.title: WHO Director-General visits Jordan to recognize strong collaboration on health s
items.body: The Director-General of the World Health Organization, Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, today concluded the first day of his two-day State visit to the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan, underscoring the stro

sections.title: 健康生活

sections.overview: 社交媒体对幸福感的负面影响被量化，教育领域AI与手机禁令的“副作用”同样被研究揭示。与此同时，从恐龙巢穴复原到南极“粉色岩石”指向隐藏巨体，基础科学仍在不断刷新认知边界。

items.title: World Happiness Report highlights social media's negative impact, ranks Finland
items.body: Heavy social media use contributes to a stark decline in well-being among young people, with the effects particularly worrying in teenage girls in English-speaking countries and Western Europe, accord
items.insight: 幸福报告点名社交媒体伤害年轻人福祉，提示“连接”不等于“支持”；平台治理与家庭、学校的使用边界将成为公共议题。

items.title: More and more teachers and students are using AI, even though it might do more h
items.body: K-12 teachers and students across the country are increasingly using AI in and out of classrooms, whether it is teachers turning to AI to refine lesson plans or students asking AI to help them researc
items.insight: 师生广泛使用AI但担心伤害学习，关键在评价体系与课堂设计没跟上；若不改考核，AI只会把“完成作业”与“获得能力”进一步分离。

items.title: School phone policies not silver bullet for student outcomes
items.body: Students who attend schools with smartphone bans report missing sleep to make up for "lost time" on their phones but benefit from more face-to-face socializing in the school day, as a new UK study rev
items.insight: 手机禁令并非银弹：学生可能用熬夜补“屏幕时间”，反而损害睡眠；学校管理需要配套数字素养与行为干预，而非一禁了之。

items.title: These strange pink rocks just revealed a hidden giant beneath Antarctica
items.body: Pink granite boulders sitting mysteriously atop Antarctica’s Hudson Mountains have led scientists to a stunning discovery: a hidden granite mass buried beneath Pine Island Glacier, stretching nearly 1
items.insight: 南极粉色花岗岩指向地下隐藏巨体，为冰下地质演化提供新证据；这类发现会影响我们对冰盖稳定性与资源分布的长期推演。

items.title: Scientists recreated a dinosaur nest to solve a 70-million-year-old mystery
items.body: Scientists recreated a life-size oviraptor nest to understand how these dinosaurs hatched their eggs. Their experiments showed the parent likely couldn’t heat all the eggs directly, meaning sunlight p
items.insight: 复原恐龙巢穴解决7000万年前谜题，体现实验古生物学的价值：用工程与物理还原行为，能把化石从“形态”推向“生态”。

items.title: Changing shower and toilet habits could help close England's five billion-liter
items.body: Changing how people shower, report leaks and flush toilets could help close England's projected five billion liter daily water shortfall—but only if the water sector builds the evidence base to make i

items.title: Mystery fish deaths in Papua New Guinea prompt health warning
items.body: Villagers on a remote island in Papua New Guinea have been warned not to eat fish until scientists can identify the cause of thousands of deaths of marine creatures and hundreds of cases of illness.

items.title: Some 'designer' crossbreed dogs may have more problem behaviors than pure breeds
items.body: In a new, survey-based study of three kinds of "designer" crossbreed dogs, cockapoos, cavapoos and labradoodles, all three showed more undesirable behaviors than at least one of their purebred progeni

sections.title: 科学探索

history_today.event: 美国国会通过《时区法》，确立标准时区制度
悉尼海港大桥正式通车，成澳大利亚地标
法国与阿尔及利亚签署埃维昂协议，结束战争
伊拉克战争爆发，美英对伊发动军事行动
布鲁塞尔恐袭前夕，欧洲反恐警戒持续升级

almanac.fortune: 稳住节奏，先控风险再谈扩张。

daily_question.question: 霍尔木兹护航应由谁买单？

quote.text: In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
quote.author: Albert Einstein
quote.zh: 在困难的中心，蕴藏着机会。
